# OscarPoolVibes

## About
OscarPoolVibes is a web application for creating and managing Oscar prediction pools. Users create pools, invite friends, make predictions for Academy Award categories (first choice and runner-up), and compete on a leaderboard.

## Key Pages
- / — Homepage with app description and sign-in
- /auth/signin — Sign in with Google OAuth or email magic link
- /pools — Browse and manage your prediction pools
- /pools/[id] — Pool detail with members, predictions, and leaderboard
- /pools/[id]/predict — Make predictions for each Oscar category
- /pools/[id]/leaderboard — View pool rankings and scores
- /pools/join?code=[code] — Join a pool via invite code
- /results/[ceremonyYearId] — Enter ceremony results (authorized users only)
- /admin — Manage ceremony years, categories, and nominees

## Features
- Google OAuth and email magic-link authentication
- Open and invite-only pool types
- First-choice and runner-up predictions per category
- Real-time scoring with leaderboard
- Results entry with optimistic concurrency control
- Role-based permissions (Admin, Results Manager, Member)

## Technology
- Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- PostgreSQL on Neon, Prisma ORM
- Auth.js v5, Vercel hosting
